stories.title: How are Super Bowl rosters built? Barnwell went po...
stories.summary: Do teams need first-round QBs to reach the Super Bowl? Is it crucial to spend big on No. 1 receivers and top-tier edge rushers? Let's sort through rosters from the past 15 Super Bowls.

stories.title: Why Year 2 of Ben Johnson has a different vibe wit...
stories.summary: Johnson established himself in Year 1, but success established expectations.

stories.title: Sources: UCLA lands possible top NBA draft pick
stories.summary: Nikola Kusturica has reached a multiyear agreement to play for UCLA, giving the Bruins an early contender for the No. 1 pick in the 2028 NBA draft.

stories.title: Ducks match Flyers' $90M offer to Carlsson
stories.summary: The Ducks have matched the Flyers' five-year offer sheet for star 21-year-old center Leo Carlsson that is worth an NHL-high $18 million per season.

stories.title: Sources: Pulisic has microfracture, bone bruise
stories.summary: USMNT and AC Milan attacker Christian Pulisic sustained a bone bruise and microfracture in his lower leg and will be sidelined for several weeks, U.S. Soccer confirmed on Thursday.
